title: Head of Product — Payments & Financial Services
reasoning: Strong FinTech background and Berlin location match. Missing team leadership evidence.
description:
N26 is Europe's leading mobile bank with over 8 million customers across 24 markets. We are building the first global mobile bank — one that manages all financial needs in one place.

As Head of Product for Payments & Financial Services, you will own the product strategy and execution for N26's core payments products, including instant transfers, international payments, insurance, and credit features. You will lead a team of 6-8 product managers and work closely with engineering, design, data science, compliance, and business teams.

Responsibilities:
- Define and own the multi-year product vision and roadmap for the Payments & Financial Services domain
- Lead, mentor, and grow a team of product managers
- Drive alignment across engineering, design, data, compliance, and marketing
- Own key business metrics: transaction volume, activation rate, revenue per user
- Work with C-level and senior leadership to shape company-wide product strategy
- Represent the product organisation in external partner and regulatory discussions
- Champion a data-driven, customer-obsessed product culture

Requirements:
- 7+ years in product management, with at least 2 years in a leadership role managing other PMs
- Proven track record of shipping successful consumer products at scale (1M+ users)
- Deep understanding of payments, financial regulation (PSD2, AML), or FinTech infrastructure
- Strong analytical skills — comfortable with SQL, dashboards, and experiment design
- Excellent communicator — able to influence without authority at senior levels
- Experience working in a fast-paced, international environment
- Fluent in English; German is a plus

Nice to have:
- Experience scaling a product from 1M to 10M+ users
- Background in consumer banking or neobank products
- Experience with ML/AI-powered product features
- Mobile-first product experience (iOS/Android)
